allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\).data;console.log\('range', d.date_from, '→', d.date_to, '| days:', d.days.length, '| totals', JSON.stringify\(d.totals\)\)}\)")

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'nodemon|server\\.js' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch 'vite|Client' } | Select-Object ProcessId, @{n='CmdLine';e={$_.CommandLine}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell(taskkill /F /T /PID 2052 2>$null; taskkill /F /PID 48412 2>$null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $still = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'nodemon|server\\.js' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch 'vite|Client' }; if \($still\) { "STILL RUNNING: " + \($still.ProcessId -join ','\) } else { "Server stopped." })

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''server\\.js'\\'' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch '\\''vite|Client'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId | Format-Table -AutoSize')

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 111288, 116456, 21208\) { taskkill /F /T /PID $p 2>$null | Out-Null }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; $still = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'nodemon|server\\.js' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch 'vite|Client' }; if \($still\) { "STILL RUNNING: " + \($still.ProcessId -join ','\) } else { "Server stopped." })

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./Server/src/data/helpKnowledge.json'\); console.log\('type:', Array.isArray\(d\)?'array len '+d.length:'object keys '+Object.keys\(d\).join\(','\)\); const arr=Array.isArray\(d\)?d:\(d.entries||d.topics||[]\); console.log\('sample entry keys:', arr[0]?Object.keys\(arr[0]\).join\(','\):'n/a'\); console.log\('titles:'\); arr.forEach\(e=>console.log\('  -',e.id||'', '|', \(e.title||e.q||''\).slice\(0,70\)\)\);")
